scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && tsx src/server/dev.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-core build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noCheck && BORING_USE_LOCAL_PACKAGES=1 vite build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-core build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noEmit
